title: Calira EVS 30/20 DS/IU
summary: Main charger and habitation power-management unit.
content:
Purpose. Main charger and habitation power-management unit.

Overview

This chapter forms part of the working technical record for the 2009 Knaus Sun Traveller. It explains the system in practical terms, identifies the checks an owner should carry out and separates confirmed information from items still awaiting an identification plate, wiring trace or manufacturer document.

The correct approach is to inspect first, measure second and replace parts only after the fault or requirement has been confirmed. Photograph every connector before disconnecting it. Record fuse ratings, cable colours and component labels exactly as found on the vehicle.

Key information

  • 230 V battery charging and 12 V supply functions
  • Ventilation, inspection and charging-voltage checks
  • Connections to battery and distribution equipment
  • Compatibility checks before lithium conversion

Inspection procedure

  1. Make the system safe. Disconnect 230 V hook-up and isolate the relevant battery or gas supply where the task requires it.
  2. Carry out a visual inspection before moving any wiring, pipework or fittings. Look for heat, corrosion, abrasion, leaks, loose fasteners and previous modifications.
  3. Confirm the supply and control conditions required for normal operation. Use a digital multimeter for electrical checks and approved leak-detection methods for gas work.
  4. Compare findings with the photographs, fuse tables and service records stored in this app.
  5. After any repair, test the complete operating sequence and record the date, mileage, parts used and result in the Service Log.

Owner checklist

Verification status

Verified from photographs and prior inspection, with connector-level details still pending.

Important. Do not use generic torque figures, fuse uprating or unverified connector pinouts. The app marks model-specific gaps so they remain visible rather than being filled with assumptions.

Confirmed vehicle installation

The red Calira EVS 30/20-DS/IU in your electrical compartment is the main habitation charger and supply unit. Its label and location are confirmed from your photograph.

230 V hook-up→Calira EVS→Leisure battery and 12 V distribution

Vehicle photographs

Official Knaus reference

Power supply and charger

This manufacturer manual is the MJ 2006 edition supplied directly by Knaus. Use it as the official Sun-Traveller model-family reference, then match every option and component to your 2009 vehicle.
